title: Biopsy container
abstract: The invention relates to a biopsy container, a biopsy device, an imaging system, and a method for processing images of a biopsy container. The biopsy container comprises a container orientation mark and an alignment mark. The container orientation mark is configured for a cooperation with a corresponding shaft orientation mark arranged on a tube shaft of a biopsy device to indicate a specific orientation of the biopsy container relative to the tube shaft. The alignment mark is configured for a registration of images of the biopsy container.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A biopsy container (20), comprising: - a container orientation mark (23), and - an alignment mark (24), wherein the container orientation mark (23) is configured for a cooperation with a corresponding shaft orientation mark (31) arranged on a tube shaft (30) of a biopsy device (40) to indicate a specific orientation of the biopsy container (20) relative to the tube shaft (30), and wherein the alignment mark (24) is configured for a registration of images of the biopsy container (20). 2. Biopsy container (20) according to claim 1, wherein the container orientation mark (23) and the alignment mark (24) are the same mark. 3. Biopsy container (20) according to claim 1 , wherein the container orientation mark (23) and the alignment mark (24) are different marks. 4. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the alignment mark (24) comprises a line. 5. Biopsy container (20) according to the preceding claim, wherein the line is continuous. 6. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the claims 1 to 3, wherein the alignment mark (24) comprises a curve. 7. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the alignment mark (24) comprises two lines or curves. 8. Biopsy container (20) according to the preceding claim, wherein the two lines or curves are arranged parallel to each other. 9. Biopsy container (20) according to claim 7, wherein the two lines or curves are arranged at different parts of the biopsy container (20). 10. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein a starting point of the alignment mark (24) is provided with a starting symbol. 1 1. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the alignment mark (24), the container orientation mark (23) and/or the shaft orientation mark (31) are detectable by an imaging unit (2). 12. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the alignment mark (24) is provided on a surface of the biopsy container (20). 13. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the claims 1 to 1 1, wherein the alignment mark (24) is embedded into a surface of the biopsy container (20). 14. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the container orientation mark (23) and the shaft orientation mark (31) are visual marks. 15. Biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein one of the container orientation mark (23) and the shaft orientation mark (31) comprises a protrusion and the other an indention matching to the protrusion. 16. A biopsy device (40), comprising: a biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, and a tube shaft (30), wherein a container orientation mark (23) of the biopsy container (20) is configured for a cooperation with a corresponding shaft orientation mark (31) of the tube shaft (30) to indicate a specific orientation of the biopsy container (20) relative to the tube shaft (30). 17. Biopsy device (40) according to the preceding claim, wherein the tube shaft (30) is provided with a shaft marker (34) configured for an alignment with an alignment mark (24) of the biopsy container (20). 18. Biopsy device (40) according to the preceding claim, wherein the shaft marker (34) is detectable by an imaging unit (2). 19. An imaging system ( 1 ), comprising : - an imaging unit (2), a processing unit (3), and a biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the imaging unit (2) is configured to provide images of the biopsy container (20), and wherein the processing unit (3) is configured to register the images of the biopsy container (20). 20. A method for processing images of a biopsy container (20), comprising the following steps: - providing images of a biopsy container (20) according to one of the preceding claims, detecting an alignment mark (24) of the biopsy container (20) in the images, determining an orientation of the biopsy container (20) in the images, and performing a registration of the images by means of the alignment mark (24). 21. Method according to the preceding claim, wherein the registration is performed to a single common coordinate system with a known relation to a coordinate system of a tube shaft (30).
